summary: Lead tracking system with full-funnel attribution tested successfully. All 10 features verified: Backend API (POST/GET demo-requests, analytics), channel classification, source parsing, marketing pages with source-tagged CTAs, static demo form with source badge, and admin lead-tracking dashboard.

POST_demo_requests_basic.details: Accepts name, email, source, utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign, utm_content, utm_term, referrer fields

POST_demo_requests_channel_classificatio.details: Auto-classifies channels: facebook+paid_social=paid_social, google+cpc=paid_search, website source=organic

POST_demo_requests_source_parsing.details: Parses source into source_page and source_position (e.g., 'digital_card_hero' -> page='digital_card', position='hero')

GET_analytics_endpoint.details: Returns summary, by_channel, by_page, by_position, by_source, by_campaign, daily_trend, recent_requests

GET_demo_requests_list.details: Returns all demo requests with proper fields (name, email, source, channel, created_at, etc.)

marketing_homepage_source_tracking.details: Nav has ?source=homepage_nav, Hero has ?source=homepage_hero, CTA has ?source=homepage_cta, Footer has ?source=homepage_footer

digital_card_page_source_tracking.details: Hero CTA has ?source=digital_card_hero, Nav has ?source=digital_card_nav, Bottom CTA has ?source=digital_card_cta, Footer has ?source=digital_card_footer

admin_lead_tracking_dashboard.details: Dashboard loads with summary cards (Total Requests, All Time, Top Page, Top Channel), By Channel breakdown, By Page breakdown, By CTA Position section

seed_data_creation: Test data auto-created during backend testing (TEST_ prefixed emails). Database had 26 demo requests at test time.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lead tracking system fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_demo_requests.py cover POST/GET APIs, channel classification, source parsing, and analytics. Marketing pages (static HTML) served from /app/marketing/build/. Admin dashboard at /admin/lead-tracking displays all analytics correctly. Note: Expo ScrollView in admin page doesn't respond to window.scrollTo but data loads correctly. Twilio SMS remains MOCKED.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: Mocked - not testing actual SMS sending
